scripts.test:smoke: QA_COMPACT=1 QA_BROWSERS=chromium QA_WORKERS=1 playwright test tests/smoke.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1
scripts.test:auth:desktop: QA_COMPACT=1 QA_BROWSERS=chromium QA_WORKERS=1 playwright test tests/mvp-auth-sessions.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1 --grep 'desktop login, CSRF request, and logout'
scripts.test:auth:mobile: QA_COMPACT=1 QA_BROWSERS=chromium QA_WORKERS=1 playwright test tests/mvp-auth-sessions.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1 --grep 'mobile login remains usable without horizontal overflow'
